schemas:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -22,6 +22,68 @@
 DEFINE FIELD OVERWRITE created_at ON TABLE billing TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now();
 DEFINE FIELD OVERWRITE updated_at ON TABLE billing TYPE datetime VALUE time::now();

+DEFINE FUNCTION OVERWRITE fn::signin($email: string, $password: string) {
+    LET $user = SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = $email AND crypto::argon2::compare(password_hash, $password);
+    return $user;
+};
+DEFINE FUNCTION OVERWRITE fn::signup_customer_tenant($first_name: string, $last_name: string,$tenant_name: string,$email: string, $password: string, $settings: object ) {
+
+    // Create a slug for the tenant name
+    // - This gives us a human URL-friendly string
+    let $randomised_tenant_name = string::join("-",string::slug($tenant_name),rand::string(7));
+    let $tenant_slug = string::slug($randomised_tenant_name);
+
+    // Create a customer type tenant
+    let $tenant = CREATE ONLY tenant CONTENT {
+        name: $tenant_name,
+        slug: $tenant_slug,
+        tenant_type: "customer",
+        contact_email: $email,
+        billing_enabled: true,
+        billing_responsibility: "self",
+        status: "active",
+        settings: $settings,
+        created_at: time::now(),
+        updated_at: time::now()
+    };
+
+    // Create the user record
+    // - Ensure the new tenant is an accessible tenant and primary tenant
+    let $user = CREATE ONLY user CONTENT {
+        email: $email,
+        password_hash: crypto::argon2::generate($password),
+        first_name: $first_name,
+        last_name: $last_name,
+        is_active: $is_active,
+        signup_completed: false,
+        primary_tenant: $tenant.id,
+        accessible_tenants: [$tenant.id],
+         password_must_change: false,
+         password_changed_at: time::now(),
+         created_at: time::now(),
+         updated_at: time::now()
+    };    
+
+    // Assign the tenant admin role to the user
+    // - for this customer tenant
+    let $tenant_admin_role = CREATE ONLY user_role CONTENT {
+        user: $user.id,
+        role: role:tenant_admin,
+        tenant: $tenant.id,
+        granted_by: user:super_admin,
+        granted_at: time::now(),
+        expires_at: None,
+        is_active: true
+    };
+
+    RETURN {
+        user: $user,
+        tenant: $tenant
+    };
+};
+
+
+
 DEFINE TABLE OVERWRITE msp_customer_relationship SCHEMAFULL
     PERMISSIONS 
         FOR select WHERE fn::has_permission(<string>$auth.id, 'msp.view_all', NONE) OR
@@ -134,7 +196,7 @@
 DEFINE FIELD OVERWRITE last_login ON TABLE user TYPE option<datetime>;
 DEFINE FIELD OVERWRITE password_changed_at ON TABLE user TYPE option<datetime>;
 DEFINE FIELD OVERWRITE created_at ON TABLE user TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now();
-DEFINE FIELD  OVERWRITE updated_at ON TABLE user TYPE datetime VALUE time::now();
+DEFINE FIELD OVERWRITE updated_at ON TABLE user TYPE datetime VALUE time::now();
 DEFINE TABLE OVERWRITE user_role SCHEMAFULL
     PERMISSIONS 
         FOR select WHERE $auth.id = user OR
